name: MAN AHL DIVERSIFIED I LP
summary: Man-AHL Diversified I L.P. is a Delaware limited partnership that engages in speculative trading of physical commodities, futures contracts, spot and forward contracts, swaps, options, and other financial derivatives on domestic and international exchanges. It operates as a feeder fund investing substantially all assets in Man AHL-Diversified Trading Company L.P., trading globally across currencies, bonds, energies, stock indices, interest rates, metals, agricultural, and volatility sectors using a systematic, quantitative investment strategy.
